assessor_raw: Multimodal pathology experiment: methodologically rigorous with site-and-time stratified split. Macro-F1 appropriately weights rare subtypes. Image-only baseline with identical architecture correctly isolates text contribution. Label leakage audit is a necessary control. Fit-apply separation is explicit. Bootstrap CIs and per-class metrics with CIs address clinical uncertainty. Scope honestly bounded to studied institutions. Verdict: defense_wins.
